benefits.description: Belt is two notches tighter and belly bulge is a bit smaller after the Tesamorelin cycle; results maintained after stopping

side_effects.description: Wakes suddenly if Tesamorelin injected later in the evening; resolved by injecting at 3pm instead of before bed

protocol_notes: On Retatrutide for weight loss. Did a cycle of Tesamorelin for visceral fat due to cortisol replacement therapy causing major visceral fat accumulation. No weight measurements or scans taken. Found 3pm injection time better than before bed. Plans another multi-week cycle.
